expectations.text: Output file exists at the specified outputs/research.md path

expectations.text: Document references the Task tool invocation pattern for spawning agents
expectations.evidence: Task invocation pattern documented with syntax 'Task(subagent_type="agent-name")' and multiple examples including prism-locator, log-investigator, codebase-locator. Also documents the alternative Agent() syntax in prism-docs-update.

All 11 agents listed with paths: agents/codebase-locator.md, agents/codebase-analyzer.md, agents/codebase-pattern-finder.md, agents/prism-locator.md, agents/prism-analyzer.md, agents/web-search-researcher.md, agents/browser-verifier.md, agents/graph-navigator.md, agents/log-investigator.md, agents/state-investigator.md, agents/git-investigator.md
